methodsAttempted.query: site:unamur.be (intelligence artificielle OR IA OR ChatGPT OR "intelligence artificielle generative" OR generative) University of Namur
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned the official UNamur AI institutional positioning page.
Official AI page linked to the generative-AI guidance page, AI education page, AI Council page, and related news.

robots.txt was fetched directly and did not disallow the crawled public paths or PDF.

artifacts.sourceTitle: L'IA a l'UNamur : explorer, innover, guider
Lignes de conduite sur l'utilisation des systemes d'intelligence artificielle generative

artifacts.claimText: University of Namur frames generative AI use around five guiding principles: transparency, training, critical reflection, respect for protected materials/personal data/confidential information, and responsibility for final outputs and consequences.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Pour une utilisation raisonnée et responsable de l'IAGen, l'UNamur pose cinq principes directeurs : TRANSPARENCE, FORMATION, RÉFLEXION, RESPECT des matériaux protégés par le copyright, les données à caractère personnel et les informations confidentielles ; RESPONSABILITÉ du produit final.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For responsible generative-AI use, UNamur lists five principles: transparency, training, critical reflection, respect for copyright/personal/confidential data, and responsibility for the final product.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow summary of the official UNamur principles page; not marked canonical or human reviewed.

artifacts.claimText: University of Namur's AI Council produced student-facing generative-AI guidelines and the university says those guidelines will later be adapted for other university member roles.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Le Conseil de l'IA de l'UNamur a produit un document pour donner un cadre clair et guider les étudiants dans l'utilisation de l'IAGen dans leurs activités. Ces lignes de conduites seront déclinées prochainement aux membres de l'Université en fonction de leurs métiers.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: UNamur's AI Council produced a document to guide students in using generative AI, and the guidance will later be adapted to other university member roles.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Les lignes de conduites de l'UNamur
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a source-status claim about current student guidelines and future role-specific guidance only.

artifacts.claimText: For students, UNamur allows some generative-AI uses without referencing when they are not contrary to course objectives, including brainstorming or organizing ideas without content creation, translation or summarization for comprehension, and short language improvement of text written by the student.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Lignes de conduite sur l'utilisation des systemes d'intelligence artificielle generative
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Pour autant que cela ne soit pas contraire aux objectifs du cours ou à l'apprentissage de l'étudiant (cf. fiche descriptive), les utilisations suivantes sont permises sans référencement nécessaire : brainstorming ou organisation des idées... traduction intégrale ou résumé d'un texte... traduction ou amélioration d'un passage court.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: If not contrary to course objectives or learning, UNamur permits some uses without referencing: brainstorming or organizing ideas, translation/summary for comprehension, and short language improvement.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: PDF section 3.1, Usages autorisés ne nécessitant pas le référencement
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Lignes de conduite sur l'utilisation des systemes d'intelligence artificielle generative
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved because the claim preserves the course-objective limitation and does not generalize beyond students.

artifacts.claimText: For students, UNamur permits use of AI-generated content in work only when it is consistent with course objectives, remains accessory, and is clearly referenced with how it was produced.

citation.citationTitle: Lignes de conduite sur l'utilisation des systemes d'intelligence artificielle generative
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Lignes de conduite sur l'utilisation des systemes d'intelligence artificielle generative
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Pour autant que cela ne soit pas contraire aux objectifs du cours ou à l'apprentissage de l'étudiant (cf. fiche descriptive), les utilisations suivantes sont permises avec référencement : reproduction d'un contenu généré par une IAGen... en indiquant clairement comment il a été réalisé... tant que ce contenu reste accessoire.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: UNamur permits reproduction of AI-generated content with referencing when it is not contrary to course objectives and remains accessory, with clear indication of how it was made.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow student-work claim preserving the accessory-content and course-objective conditions.

artifacts.claimText: For students, unless course objectives or explicit instructor authorization allow it, UNamur proscribes delegating reflective analysis to generative AI, submitting work entirely or mostly generated by AI, and using copied, paraphrased, translated, or AI-generated material without indicating the source.

citation.citationTitle: Lignes de conduite sur l'utilisation des systemes d'intelligence artificielle generative
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Lignes de conduite sur l'utilisation des systemes d'intelligence artificielle generative
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Sauf si cela fait partie des objectifs du cours (cf. fiche descriptive) ou avec l'autorisation explicite de l'enseignant, les utilisations suivantes sont proscrites par l'institution : délégation de l'analyse réflexive... génération intégrale d'une production... copie textuelle... résumé ou paraphrase... traduction d'un texte sans... mentionner la provenance.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Unless course objectives or explicit instructor authorization allow it, UNamur proscribes delegating reflective analysis, fully generated work, and unattributed copied, paraphrased, translated, or AI-generated material.

artifacts.claimText: For students, unless course objectives or explicit instructor authorization allow it, UNamur says they cannot introduce non-anonymized or non-pseudonymized personal data into prompts addressed to generative-AI tools.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Sauf si cela fait partie des objectifs du cours (cf. fiche descriptive) ou avec l'autorisation explicite de l'enseignant, l'étudiant, dans son interaction avec l'outil IAGen, ne peut pas : introduire de données à caractère personnel non anonymisées ou non pseudonymisées dans les demandes adressées à l'IAGen (prompt).

artifacts.title: University of Namur staged AI policy evidence
artifacts.summary: Staged evidence from official University of Namur AI pages and student generative-AI guidelines. Claims cover institutional AI principles, source status of student guidelines, student academic-integrity treatment of AI use, privacy limits for prompts, and a general critical/responsible teaching objective.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The strongest policy evidence is student-facing; claims do not infer complete rules for staff, researchers, or all university operations beyond the cited text.
Login-only WebCampus and SharePoint support links were not accessed or used as evidence.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
